commands.review_summary:
The PR adds `diagnostics.otel.sessionAttribute` and emits a SHA-256 hash of the diagnostic session key as `langfuse.session.id` on root OTel run spans.

PR surface: Source +24, Tests +72. Total +96 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the feature gap from source: current main has no `sessionAttribute` or `langfuse.session.id` emission path on the OTel root run spans. I did not run a live Langfuse collector in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining blocker is a narrow, mechanical config metadata and docs repair that can be attempted on the PR branch without changing the feature direction.
